data/maps/GraniteCave_1F/text.inc.GraniteCave_1F_Text_194917:
Hey, you.
It gets awfully dark ahead.\lIt'll be tough trying to explore.\pThat guy who came by earlier...
STEVEN, I think it was.\pHe knew how to use FLASH, so he ought
to be all right, but...\pWell, for us HIKERS, helping out those
that we meet is our motto.\pHere you go, I'll pass this on to you.
data/maps/GraniteCave_1F/text.inc.GraniteCave_1F_Text_194A3E:
Teach that hidden move FLASH to a
POKéMON and use it.\pIt lights up even the inky darkness
of caves.\pBut, to use it, you need the GYM BADGE
from DEWFORD's POKéMON GYM.
